information.name: Information
information.description: Possessing the prerequisite concepts/terminology and background knowledge required to understand the current content.
information.coreQuestion: Do I know the necessary concepts and information?

reasoning.name: Reasoning
reasoning.description: Understanding the logical relationships that connect information into coherent explanations.
reasoning.coreQuestion: Do I understand why the concepts are connected this way?

construction.name: Construction
construction.description: Organizing and integrating understanding into a stable mental model that can be reused and transferred.
construction.coreQuestion: Can I organize and apply this understanding beyond the current example?
